panels.description: Latency from request start to first token returned (in seconds).

targets.expr:
sum by(model_name) (rate(e2e_request_latency_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name) (rate(e2e_request_latency_seconds_count{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval]))

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

panels.title: E2E Request Latency

panels.description: Percentage of used cache blocks by vLLM.

targets.expr: cpu_cache_usage_perc{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}

panels.title: Cache Utilization

panels.description: Number of prompt tokens processed per second

targets.expr: sum by (model_name) (rate(request_prompt_tokens_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval]))

panels.title: Input token rate

panels.description: Number of output tokens generated per second

targets.expr: sum by (model_name) (rate(generation_tokens_total{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval]))

panels.title: Output token rate

panels.description: P50, P90, P95, and P99 TTFT latency.

targets.expr:
(sum by(model_name) (rate(time_to_first_token_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name) (rate(time_to_first_token_seconds_count{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name)(rate(time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by(le, model_name)(rate(time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, model_name)(rate(time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

panels.title: Time To First Token Latency

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

(sum by(model_name) (rate(time_per_output_token_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name) (rate(time_per_output_token_seconds_count{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])))

panels.description: Percentage of prefix cache queries that resulted in a cache hit (GPU).

targets.expr: increase(gpu_prefix_cache_hits_total{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval]) / increase(gpu_prefix_cache_queries_total{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval])

panels.title: Prefix Cache Hit Rate

targets.expr: sum by(model_name, model_id) (rate(request_decode_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval]))
sum by(model_name, model_id) (rate(request_prefill_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$model_name", model_id=~"$model_id", cluster_id=~"$cluster_id", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$interval]))

list.description: Select the Prometheus datasource for monitoring metrics.
list.label: Data Source
list.name: datasource
